description_long: This muffin features a golden-brown base with a slightly textured surface, suggesting a baked, spongy interior. The top is generously covered with a thick layer of red frosting, which appears smooth and glossy, enveloping the upper portion of the muffin. Above the frosting, a swirl of white icing is piped in a spiral, giving a soft, creamy appearance. At the very top, a round, red decorative element sits like a cherry, adding a playful touch. The muffin is not enclosed in a visible wrapper, exposing its textured base. The object is shown isolated against a plain white background, with no additional context or props.
description: A golden-brown muffin with red frosting, white swirled icing, and a round red topper, shown without a visible wrapper and isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red frosting, white swirled icing, and the round red topper clearly, with the muffin base visible below.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, maintaining a clear view of the frosting and topper, with the muffin base's texture more visible on the left side.
description_view_2: Another rotated angle, similar to view 1, with the red frosting and white icing swirl prominent, and the muffin base's right side more exposed.
description_view_3: Back view, showing the red frosting and white icing swirl, with the muffin base's rear surface visible and the topper still centered.
attribute_frosting_style: swirled buttercream with a smooth, glossy finish and a round red topper
